# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd default authorization policy for a namespace. Configure policy to handle services without explicit authorization rules. Set up default behavior for service-to-service communication. This is for our service mesh policy framework.

Prevent linkerd policy default allow.
# Category: linkerd_policy_default_allow

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: <namespace_name> # replace with your namespace's actual value, e.g., my-linkerd-ns
spec: {}
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: default
  namespace: ${NAMESPACE} # use the environment variable NAMESPACE to set it dynamically, e.g., my-linkerd-ns in this case
spec: {}
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceEntryPolicy
metadata:
  name: default
  namespace: ${NAMESPACE} # use the environment variable NAMESPACE to set it dynamically, e.g., my-linkerd-ns in this case  
spec: {}
